rationale: Section 45.002 grants school districts authority to levy ad valorem taxes but does not prescribe homestead exemption amounts. Exemption levels are set by Tax Code §11.13; increasing the exemption shrinks the tax base but does not negate or contradict this taxing authority.
quote: may levy, assess, and collect annual ad valorem taxes for the further maintenance of public schools in the district, subject to Section 45.003.
_note: No direct statutory conflict. Fiscal impact on school district revenue is an operational consequence, not a legal inconsistency with §45.002's grant of authority.
